description: Statement of cash flows showing how cash moves in and out of the business across operating, investing and financing activities.

fiscalYear.description: 4-digit fiscal year derived from the date column

netIncome.description: Net income as reported on the income statement, used as the starting point for cash flow.

depreciationAndAmortization.description: Non-cash depreciation and amortization added back to net income.

deferredIncomeTax.description: Change in deferred tax assets and liabilities.

stockBasedCompensation.description: Non-cash expense for equity-based employee compensation added back.

changeInWorkingCapital.description: Net change in current assets minus current liabilities.

accountsReceivables.description: Change in accounts receivable balances during the period.

inventory.description: Change in inventory levels during the period.

accountsPayables.description: Change in accounts payable balances during the period.

otherWorkingCapital.description: Other working capital changes not separately classified.

otherNonCashItems.description: Other non-cash adjustments to reconcile net income to cash flow.

netCashProvidedByOperatingActivities.description: Total net cash generated from core business operations.

investmentsInPropertyPlantAndEquipment.description: Cash spent on purchasing or improving physical assets.

acquisitionsNet.description: Net cash paid for business acquisitions.

purchasesOfInvestments.description: Cash used to purchase investment securities.

salesMaturitiesOfInvestments.description: Cash received from selling or maturing investment securities.

otherInvestingActivities.description: Other investing cash flows not separately classified.

netCashProvidedByInvestingActivities.description: Total net cash from all investing activities.

netDebtIssuance.description: Net proceeds from issuing or repaying debt.

longTermNetDebtIssuance.description: Net long-term debt issued or repaid.

shortTermNetDebtIssuance.description: Net short-term debt issued or repaid.

netStockIssuance.description: Net cash from issuing or repurchasing all classes of stock.

netCommonStockIssuance.description: Net cash from issuing or repurchasing common stock.

commonStockRepurchased.description: Cash spent repurchasing common shares (buybacks). Usually negative.

netPreferredStockIssuance.description: Net cash from issuing or redeeming preferred stock.

netDividendsPaid.description: Total dividends paid to all shareholders. Usually negative.

otherFinancingActivities.description: Other financing cash flows not separately classified.

netCashProvidedByFinancingActivities.description: Total net cash from all financing activities.

effectOfForexChangesOnCash.description: Impact of foreign exchange rate changes on cash balances.

netChangeInCash.description: Net increase or decrease in cash during the period.

cashAtEndOfPeriod.description: Cash balance at the end of the reporting period.

cashAtBeginningOfPeriod.description: Cash balance at the beginning of the reporting period.

operatingCashFlow.description: Cash generated from core operations. Primary measure of operational cash health.

capitalExpenditure.description: Cash spent on long-term physical assets (property, plant, equipment). Usually negative.

freeCashFlow.description: Operating cash flow minus capital expenditure. Measures cash available after maintaining operations.

incomeTaxesPaid.description: Actual cash paid for income taxes during the period.

interestPaid.description: Actual cash paid for interest on debt obligations.
